summary: Completed testing of Dispatch Lot Edit functionality. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Edit button visible in table Actions column and lot detail dialog, Edit dialog shows lot details and line items with editable quantities, save functionality works correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Test lot DL_202603_0013 created during integration test. Lot DL_202603_0001 quantity updated from 550 to 600 during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dispatch Lot Edit functionality fully tested. PUT /api/dispatch-lots/{lot_id} endpoint works correctly for updating lot fields (target_date, priority, notes) and line items (quantities, removal). Correctly rejects updates for DISPATCHED/DELIVERED lots and requires at least one line item. Frontend Edit button visible in both table Actions column and lot detail dialog. Edit dialog allows quantity changes and saves successfully with toast notification.

backend_api.GET /api/dispatch-lots/with-readiness: PASS - Returns list of dispatch lots
backend_api.PUT /api/dispatch-lots/{lot_id} - remove: PASS - Removes line keeping at least one
backend_api.PUT /api/dispatch-lots/{lot_id} - empty: PASS - Returns 400 for empty lines array

frontend_ui.edit_button_in_table: PASS - 14 Edit buttons found in table Actions column
frontend_ui.edit_button_in_detail_dialog: PASS - Edit button visible in lot detail dialog header
frontend_ui.edit_dialog_lot_details: PASS - Target date, priority, notes inputs present
frontend_ui.edit_dialog_line_items: PASS - Line items table with editable quantity inputs
frontend_ui.edit_dialog_save: PASS - Save Changes button works, shows success toast
frontend_ui.edit_button_hidden_for_dispatched: PASS - Code correctly hides Edit for DISPATCHED/DELIVERED lots
